questions.text: What is the primary advantage of a multisig wallet for a DAO treasury?

options.text: It eliminates single points of failure by requiring multiple signatures to execute any transaction.
It allows anyone to withdraw funds.
It automatically invests idle assets.
It is faster than a single-key wallet.

questions.explanation: A multisig requires M-of-N signatures, so even if one key is compromised, funds cannot be moved without the other signers.
questions.modelAnswer:
✅ Correct: A

A multisig requires M-of-N signatures, so even if one key is compromised, funds cannot be moved without the other signers.

questions.text: Which of the following is the most popular multisig wallet for DAO treasuries on EVM chains?

options.text: Gnosis Safe.
MetaMask.
Trust Wallet.
Coinbase Wallet.

questions.explanation: Gnosis Safe is the industry standard for multisig treasuries, securing over $100 billion in assets across multiple chains.
questions.modelAnswer:
✅ Correct: A

Gnosis Safe is the industry standard for multisig treasuries, securing over $100 billion in assets across multiple chains.

questions.text: What is the "endowment model" in treasury management?

options.text: Diversifying the treasury into multiple asset classes - stablecoins, blue-chip crypto, yield-bearing assets, and strategic holdings.
Holding 100% of the treasury in the DAO's own governance token.
Storing all funds in a single bank account.
Never spending any treasury funds.

questions.explanation: The endowment model diversifies the treasury to reduce risk, ensure operational resilience, and capture long-term growth.
questions.modelAnswer:
✅ Correct: A

The endowment model diversifies the treasury to reduce risk, ensure operational resilience, and capture long-term growth.

questions.text: Why is it risky for a DAO to hold 90% of its treasury in its own governance token?

options.text: If the token price crashes, the treasury becomes worthless and the DAO cannot pay its expenses.
The token will automatically be burned.
It violates securities laws.
It prevents the DAO from voting on proposals.

questions.explanation: Over-concentration in a single volatile asset, especially the DAO's own token, creates insolvency risk during market downturns.
questions.modelAnswer:
✅ Correct: A

Over-concentration in a single volatile asset, especially the DAO's own token, creates insolvency risk during market downturns.

questions.text: What is a common module used with Gnosis Safe for DAO operations?

options.text: SpendingLimit module - allows a designated address to spend up to a certain amount per day without full multisig approval.
ERC-20 module.
Uniswap module.
Staking module.

questions.explanation: The SpendingLimit module enables efficient day-to-day operations by delegating limited spending authority to a designated address.
questions.modelAnswer:
✅ Correct: A

The SpendingLimit module enables efficient day-to-day operations by delegating limited spending authority to a designated address.

questions.text: How can a DAO's treasury execute transactions automatically after a governance proposal passes?

options.text: By integrating the Governor contract with a Timelock and the Gnosis Safe, so the execution is triggered on-chain.
By having a single person manually send the funds.
By posting the transaction on social media.
By waiting for a bank transfer.

questions.explanation: The Governor + Timelock + Safe pipeline enables trustless, automated execution of approved proposals.
questions.modelAnswer:
✅ Correct: A

The Governor + Timelock + Safe pipeline enables trustless, automated execution of approved proposals.

questions.text: Why is MST's sub-paisa gas fee particularly beneficial for treasury management?

options.text: It makes frequent treasury operations (rebalancing, yield harvesting, contributor payments) economically viable.
It eliminates the need for a multisig.
It automatically diversifies the treasury.
It prevents all smart contract risks.

questions.explanation: On expensive chains, gas costs can exceed the value of treasury operations. MST's low fees enable active, democratic treasury management.
questions.modelAnswer:
✅ Correct: A

On expensive chains, gas costs can exceed the value of treasury operations. MST's low fees enable active, democratic treasury management.

questions.text: What is the recommended minimum operating reserve for a DAO treasury?

options.text: 12 - 24 months of operating expenses in stablecoins.
1 month of expenses.
100% of the treasury.
Zero - the DAO should not hold stablecoins.

questions.explanation: A healthy operating reserve ensures the DAO can survive extended bear markets without selling core assets at depressed prices.
questions.modelAnswer:
✅ Correct: A

A healthy operating reserve ensures the DAO can survive extended bear markets without selling core assets at depressed prices.

questions.text: Which of the following is a risk when deploying treasury funds into yield farms?

options.text: Smart contract risk - a bug in the yield farm contract could lead to loss of principal.
The yield is always guaranteed.
The funds become more liquid.
The gas costs are zero.

questions.explanation: Yield farming involves interacting with external smart contracts, which carry bug and exploit risks. Always use audited, battle-tested protocols.
questions.modelAnswer:
✅ Correct: A

Yield farming involves interacting with external smart contracts, which carry bug and exploit risks. Always use audited, battle-tested protocols.

questions.text: How can a DAO on MST interact with Gnosis Safe?

options.text: Gnosis Safe contracts are EVM-compatible and can be deployed on MST; the Safe UI can be configured to use an MST RPC.
Gnosis Safe only works on Ethereum mainnet.
MST has its own proprietary multisig that replaces Safe.
DAOs cannot use multisig wallets on MST.

questions.explanation: Because MST is fully EVM-compatible, Gnosis Safe contracts work identically. The UI can connect to an MST RPC endpoint.
questions.modelAnswer:
✅ Correct: A

Because MST is fully EVM-compatible, Gnosis Safe contracts work identically. The UI can connect to an MST RPC endpoint.
